final_text:
{
  "project_name": "Cricket Worldcup Management System",
  "backend_architecture": "Microservices architecture using Node.js, MongoDB, and AWS cloud services.",
  "services": [
    "Authentication Service",
    "Event Management Service",
    "Team Management Service",
    "Match Management Service",
    "Notification Service"
  ],
  "controllers": [
    "AuthController",
    "EventController",
    "TeamController",
    "MatchController",
    "NotificationController"
  ],
  "entities": [
    "User",
    "Event",
    "Team",
    "Player",
    "Match"
  ],
  "repositories": [
    "UserRepository",
    "EventRepository",
    "TeamRepository",
    "PlayerRepository",
    "MatchRepository"
  ],
  "apis": [
    "/api/auth/login",
    "/api/auth/register",
    "/api/events",
    "/api/events/{id}",
    "/api/teams",
    "/api/teams/{id}",
    "/api/matches",
    "/api/matches/{id}",
    "/api/notifications"
  ],
  "validation_rules": [
    "Email format validation for user registration",
    "Unique email constraint for user registration",
    "Event date validation",
    "Team name uniqueness validation",
    "Match date and time validation"
  ],
  "security_implementation": [
    "OAuth for user authentication",
    "HTTPS for data transmission",
    "Encryption for sensitive data storage"
  ],
  "error_handling": [
    "Custom error messages for validation errors",
    "Global error handling middleware",
    "Logging of errors for debugging"
  ],
  "developer_notes": [
    "Use environment variables for configuration",
    "Implement rate limiting for APIs",
    "Ensure proper error handling and logging"
  ]
}
